name: incident_response_runbooks_v1
description: Incident response runbook dataset covering P0-P3 severity levels across all adapterOS incident types: OOM, adapter crash, training pipeline failure, determinism violation, routing collapse, database connectivity, hot-swap failure, and certificate/key expiry. Teaches triage procedures, diagnostic commands, mitigation steps, and post-incident review practices grounded in real aosctl CLI commands, log patterns, and system architecture.

entries.notes: 2500 examples: P0 incidents (500), P1 incidents (500), diagnostic procedures (500), mitigation and recovery (500), post-incident review (500)

provenance.review_notes: Covers the full incident lifecycle from detection through post-mortem for all adapterOS incident types. Grounded in real CLI commands (aosctl diag, aosctl status, aosctl worker, aosctl quarantine, aosctl adapter swap), actual log patterns (tracing spans, structured JSON logs), health endpoint semantics (/healthz, /readyz?deep=true), and architecture details (KV cache coherence, deadlock detection exit codes 111-113, Metal buffer management, HKDF seed chain, tick ledger Merkle verification).

evaluation_gates: Model correctly triages P0 vs P1 vs P2 vs P3 severity based on blast radius and user impact
Model produces correct aosctl commands for each diagnostic step
Model identifies correct log patterns to grep for each incident type
Model distinguishes immediate mitigation from root cause remediation
Model correctly sequences incident response steps (triage, diagnose, mitigate, verify, document)
Model understands KV cache coherence and generation counter semantics during adapter crashes
Model identifies deadlock detection exit codes (111, 112, 113) and their meanings
Model correctly explains VRAM pressure thresholds and OOM handling
Model produces accurate post-incident review templates with timeline, root cause, and action items
Model understands database WAL checkpoint behavior and SQLite lock contention patterns
intent: Train the model to function as an expert incident responder for adapterOS, capable of triaging incidents by severity, running the correct diagnostic commands, interpreting system output, applying appropriate mitigations, and conducting thorough post-incident reviews. The model should produce actionable runbook-quality responses grounded in actual system architecture and tooling.

p0_oom_total_outage.description: Complete service outage due to VRAM exhaustion. All inference rejected. Triage via /healthz, aosctl status memory, check adapter memory footprints.

p0_base_model_crash.description: Base model process crash or corruption. All tenants affected. Check model server process, verify model checksums, restart sequence.

p0_database_corruption.description: SQLite database corruption or unrecoverable WAL state. All writes failing. Backup verification, integrity check, restore procedures.

p0_determinism_chain_break.description: Tick ledger Merkle chain broken. All receipts unverifiable. Stop accepting new requests, identify break point, chain repair.

p0_deadlock_cascade.description: Worker deadlock cascade. Exit codes 111-113. All workers unresponsive. Emergency restart, deadlock detection configuration.

p0_security_key_compromise.description: Ed25519 signing key compromised or expired. All receipt signing failing. Key rotation, receipt re-signing, security audit.

p0_network_partition.description: Complete network partition between nodes. Federation broken. Node isolation detection, split-brain prevention, recovery.

p0_disk_full.description: Disk space exhausted. WAL growth, checkpoint files, training artifacts. Emergency cleanup, log rotation, storage expansion.

p1_single_tenant_down.description: One tenant's adapters all failing. Other tenants unaffected. Tenant isolation check, adapter state audit, tenant-specific recovery.

p1_training_pipeline_stuck.description: Training jobs stuck in Running state past timeout. Job recovery, orphaned job cleanup, scheduler investigation.

p1_adapter_crash_hot.description: Hot adapter crashes during inference. Specific adapter affected. KV cache coherence, generation counter, adapter rollback.

p1_routing_degraded.description: Router sending disproportionate traffic to single adapter. Quality degradation. Router weight audit, calibration, safe mode.

p1_hotswap_failure.description: Adapter hot-swap fails during staging or swap phase. Old adapter still serving. Preflight check analysis, manual swap.

p1_backend_fallback.description: Primary backend (Metal/CoreML) degraded, system on fallback. Reduced throughput. Backend health check, primary recovery.

p1_elevated_error_rate.description: Error rate above threshold but service partially functional. Error pattern analysis, selective adapter quarantine.

p1_memory_pressure.description: Memory headroom below warning threshold. Not yet OOM but approaching. Proactive eviction, cache trimming, adapter lifecycle.

diag_health_endpoint_check.description: Step-by-step diagnostic using /healthz, /readyz, /readyz?deep=true. Interpreting response codes, canary probe, boot state.

diag_vram_memory_audit.description: Memory diagnostic using aosctl status memory, allocator stats, fragmentation ratio, Metal buffer inventory.

diag_adapter_state_inspection.description: Adapter diagnostic using aosctl status adapters, adapter profiles, activation patterns, policy compliance.

diag_training_job_investigation.description: Training job diagnostic using aosctl train status, job timeline, dataset version compatibility, algorithm version bundle.

diag_tick_ledger_verification.description: Determinism diagnostic using aosctl status tick, replay verification, nonce continuity, Merkle chain audit.

diag_log_pattern_analysis.description: Log-based diagnostic: structured JSON log parsing, tracing span correlation, CPID-based trace filtering.

diag_database_health.description: Database diagnostic: WAL size check, lock contention detection, integrity_check pragma, migration status.

diag_network_connectivity.description: Network diagnostic: node sync status, federation health, UDS socket connectivity, API endpoint reachability.

diag_backend_status.description: Backend diagnostic: Metal/CoreML/MLX backend health, coordinator metrics, fallback state, GPU availability.

mitigate_restart_service.description: Service restart as mitigation: graceful vs forced, worker drain sequence, state preservation, restart verification.

mitigate_adapter_rollback.description: Adapter rollback to known-good version: aosctl rollback, CPID targeting, worker restart after rollback.

mitigate_cache_eviction.description: KV cache and memory pressure mitigation: cache flush, sequence eviction, Metal buffer deallocation, quota adjustment.

mitigate_quarantine_action.description: Quarantine as containment: aosctl quarantine status/clear, policy pack isolation, adapter quarantine, rollback mode.

mitigate_training_recovery.description: Training pipeline recovery: orphaned job detection, job cancellation, dataset re-validation, scheduler reset.

mitigate_router_safe_mode.description: Router safe mode activation: aosctl router safe-mode enable, single adapter fallback, traffic isolation.

mitigate_database_repair.description: Database repair: WAL checkpoint forcing, integrity verification, backup restore, migration re-run.

mitigate_key_rotation.description: Key rotation mitigation: Ed25519 key generation, signing key update, receipt chain continuity, old key revocation.

mitigate_emergency_procedures.description: Emergency procedures: kill stuck processes, force worker restart, bypass preflight in emergencies, manual adapter loading.

postmortem_timeline_construction.description: Building incident timeline: log correlation, event sequencing, impact window calculation, detection-to-resolution measurement.

postmortem_root_cause_analysis.description: Root cause analysis techniques: five whys, fault tree, change correlation, blast radius mapping.

postmortem_action_items.description: Deriving action items: immediate fixes, preventive measures, monitoring improvements, runbook updates.

postmortem_template_writing.description: Post-incident review document structure: summary, timeline, root cause, impact, action items, lessons learned.

postmortem_metrics_analysis.description: Metrics-driven post-mortem: MTTR, MTTD, error budget impact, SLO breach assessment, trend analysis.

postmortem_communication.description: Incident communication: stakeholder updates, status page drafting, customer notification, blameless culture.

postmortem_prevention_planning.description: Prevention planning: alerting improvements, capacity planning, chaos engineering, game day exercises.

postmortem_recurring_incidents.description: Handling recurring incidents: pattern detection, systemic fixes, escalation criteria, architectural remediation.

postmortem_documentation.description: Post-mortem documentation: runbook updates, knowledge base entries, training material, on-call handoff improvements.
